revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Legend inline/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Legend inline/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Legend inline/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Legend inline/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Legend inline/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Legend inline/doc]]</includeonly>

{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Legend/styles.css}} {{Template shortcut|Legend2}} ==Description== *'''Shows a legend with a coloured box.''' *This template differs from [[:Template:Legend]] only in that it uses ''display:inline'' to prevent line breaks after each legend. ==Usage== See [[:Template:Legend/doc]] for usage. === Example 1 === 
That is a {{legend inline|#bfb|size=80%}} green box.
That is a {{legend inline|#bfb|size=80%|green box}}. === Example 2 === 
That is a {{legend inline|#bfb|text=green}} box.
That is a {{legend inline|#bfb|text=green}} box. === Example 3 === 
That is a {{legend inline
|#bfb
|box
|border    = 1px solid red
|textcolor = #00e
|size      = 150%
|text      = _green_}}.
That is a {{legend inline |#bfb |box |border = 1px solid red |textcolor = #00e |size = 150% |text =  green }}. ==See also== * For the original version of this template using ''display:block'', see {{tl|Legend}} * For legend rows representing lines, see {{tl|legend-line}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Legend templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Legend/styles.css}} {{Template shortcut|Legend2}} ==Description== *'''Shows a legend with a coloured box.''' *This template differs from [[:Template:Legend]] only in that it uses ''display:inline'' to prevent line breaks after each legend. ==Usage== See [[:Template:Legend/doc]] for usage. === Example 1 === 
That is a {{legend inline|#bfb|size=80%}} green box.
That is a {{legend inline|#bfb|size=80%|green box}}. === Example 2 === 
That is a {{legend inline|#bfb|text=green}} box.
That is a {{legend inline|#bfb|text=green}} box. === Example 3 === 
That is a {{legend inline
|#bfb
|box
|border    = 1px solid red
|textcolor = #00e
|size      = 150%
|text      = _green_}}.
That is a {{legend inline |#bfb |box |border = 1px solid red |textcolor = #00e |size = 150% |text =  green }}. ==See also== * For the original version of this template using ''display:block'', see {{tl|Legend}} * For legend rows representing lines, see {{tl|legend-line}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Legend templates]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Legend/styles.css}} {{Template shortcut|Legend2}} ==Description== *'''Shows a legend with a coloured box.''' *This template differs from [[:Template:Legend]] only in that it uses ''display:inline'' to prevent line breaks after each legend. ==Usage== See [[:Template:Legend/doc]] for usage. === Example 1 === 
That is a {{legend inline|#bfb|size=80%}} green box.
That is a {{legend inline|#bfb|size=80%|green box}}. === Example 2 === 
That is a {{legend inline|#bfb|text=green}} box.
That is a {{legend inline|#bfb|text=green}} box. === Example 3 === 
That is a {{legend inline
|#bfb
|box
|border    = 1px solid red
|textcolor = #00e
|size      = 150%
|text      = _green_}}.
That is a {{legend inline |#bfb |box |border = 1px solid red |textcolor = #00e |size = 150% |text =  green }}. ==See also== * For the original version of this template using ''display:block'', see {{tl|Legend}} * For legend rows representing lines, see {{tl|legend-line}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Legend templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Legend/styles.css}} {{Template shortcut|Legend2}} ==Description== *'''Shows a legend with a coloured box.''' *This template differs from [[:Template:Legend]] only in that it uses ''display:inline'' to prevent line breaks after each legend. ==Usage== See [[:Template:Legend/doc]] for usage. === Example 1 === 
That is a {{legend inline|#bfb|size=80%}} green box.
That is a {{legend inline|#bfb|size=80%|green box}}. === Example 2 === 
That is a {{legend inline|#bfb|text=green}} box.
That is a {{legend inline|#bfb|text=green}} box. === Example 3 === 
That is a {{legend inline
|#bfb
|box
|border    = 1px solid red
|textcolor = #00e
|size      = 150%
|text      = _green_}}.
That is a {{legend inline |#bfb |box |border = 1px solid red |textcolor = #00e |size = 150% |text =  green }}. ==See also== * For the original version of this template using ''display:block'', see {{tl|Legend}} * For legend rows representing lines, see {{tl|legend-line}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Legend templates]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23511227343|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Uses TemplateStyles|Template:Legend/styles.css}} {{Template shortcut|Legend2}} ==Description== *'''Shows a legend with a coloured box.''' *This template differs from [[:Template:Legend]] only in that it uses ''display:inline'' to prevent line breaks after each legend. ==Usage== See [[:Template:Legend/doc]] for usage. === Example 1 === 
That is a {{legend inline|#bfb|size=80%}} green box.
That is a {{legend inline|#bfb|size=80%|green box}}. === Example 2 === 
That is a {{legend inline|#bfb|text=green}} box.
That is a {{legend inline|#bfb|text=green}} box. === Example 3 === 
That is a {{legend inline
|#bfb
|box
|border    = 1px solid red
|textcolor = #00e
|size      = 150%
|text      = _green_}}.
That is a {{legend inline |#bfb |box |border = 1px solid red |textcolor = #00e |size = 150% |text =  green }}. ==See also== * For the original version of this template using ''display:block'', see {{tl|Legend}} * For legend rows representing lines, see {{tl|legend-line}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Legend templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
